home.title: Welcome
home.subtitle: Full-Stack & Tech Enthusiast
home.about: I build beautiful and functional web applications with modern technologies.
home.aboutMeP1: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable applications using modern technologies. My expertise spans backend development with Java and Spring Boot, frontend development with React and Next.js, and DevOps practices with Docker and Kubernetes.
home.aboutMeP2: I'm committed to writing clean, maintainable code and staying updated with the latest industry trends. When I'm not coding, I enjoy reading, playing chess, and contributing to the developer community.
home.techSkillsSubtitle: My core competencies and proficiency levels
home.letsWorkSubtitle: I'm always open to interesting projects and collaboration opportunities. Feel free to reach out!
home.aboutDescription: For 6+ years, I have been developing web and software projects. I build robust services on the backend with Java and Python, and develop modern interfaces on the frontend with React, TypeScript, and Next.js. My goal: fast delivery, trust, and measurable results.

aboutExpertise.backendDesc: I develop APIs, business logic, and integration layers with Java and Python.
aboutExpertise.frontendDesc: I develop fast, modern, and conversion-focused interfaces with React, TypeScript, and Next.js.
aboutExpertise.microservicesDesc: Sustainable and scalable deployment processes with Docker and CI/CD.
aboutExpertise.performanceDesc: I deliver SEO, Core Web Vitals, and secure infrastructure standards together.
aboutExpertise.consultationTitle: Website creation or ready package: which is right for you?
aboutExpertise.consultationDesc: In a 15-minute conversation, let's clarify your needs (corporate website, template, custom software) and establish the best delivery plan.
aboutExpertise.customSolutionsTitle: Custom software development: how does it work?
aboutExpertise.customSolutionsDesc: We break down the scope into sprints and deliver working features at the end of each sprint. E-commerce, corporate applications, or custom integration projects follow this approach.
aboutExpertise.aiDesc: I leverage AI tools and automation to optimize development workflows and enhance project outcomes.

services.title: Services and Transparent Pricing
services.subtitle: Two lanes: industry-specific websites for fast launch (below) and AI, automation, and custom software projects (bottom). Each package comes with a written contract, fixed price, and transparent revision policy; no hidden items.
services.pricing: Web Packages — 4–12 business days to launch · Prices exclude VAT (+VAT)
services.largeScaleSubtitle: Projects where a website is not enough: AI agent, WhatsApp and process automation, e-commerce, enterprise application and custom engineering. Sprint-based, measurable delivery.
services.readyToStartSubtitle: Let's discuss your project and find the perfect solution for your needs.

services.revisionPolicyText: Revision rounds specified in packages include design and content updates. Additional revision requests clarified in discussion. Custom software and AI projects follow sprint-based delivery and transparent change management.

templates.title: Website Templates
templates.subtitle: Browse our collection of professionally designed website templates for various industries. Each template is fully responsive and SEO-optimized.
templates.ctaSubtitle: Contact us to discuss your specific requirements. We can customize any template or create a completely unique design for your business.
templates.featuredSubtitle: Popular website templates ready for your business

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services and web development process.

questions.q1: How does the website creation process work?
questions.a1: We start by clarifying your needs (ready-made template or custom design), then build pages based on your content and branding materials, and finally deploy with technical SEO checks (meta tags, speed, mobile optimization).
questions.q2: Should I buy a ready-made website or have one custom built?
questions.a2: If your budget and time are limited, ready-made template packages are the best option. Our industry-specific templates come with SEO compliance and fast delivery. For more comprehensive needs, custom design projects are ideal.
questions.q3: Do you create websites for niche sectors like barbershops, restaurants, or clinics?
questions.a3: Yes. We have industry-specific ready-made website templates. We adapt the text and visuals for your business and launch quickly. We have experience with barbershops, salons, restaurants, clinics, logistics, energy, and many other sectors.
questions.q4: How much do website packages cost?
questions.a4: Our ready-made template packages start from ₺5,000, and corporate and custom projects are priced based on scope. Check our services page for the most current pricing.
questions.q5: Is the delivery time really 2-5 days for template packages?
questions.a5: Yes. If most of the content is ready, we launch within 2-5 days. For custom designs, the timeframe depends on the project scope.
questions.a6: Yes. All our projects include technical SEO infrastructure as standard (meta tags, Open Graph, structured data, sitemap, speed optimization, mobile responsiveness).
questions.q7: How does the custom software development process work?
questions.a7: We break down the scope into sprints and deliver working features at the end of each sprint. E-commerce, corporate applications, or custom integration projects follow this approach.
questions.q8: Do you provide support and maintenance after launch?
questions.a8: Yes. We offer monthly support plans for maintenance, updates, and improvements. This includes security patches, content updates, and performance monitoring.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.section1Text: Cookies are small text files that the website you visit saves in your browser. They can be used to make the site work, remember your preferences, and (if you consent) generate usage statistics.
cookies.section2Item1: Required / technical: Basic functions related to session and security; necessary for the site to work properly. Legal basis: GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) legitimate interest or contract performance.
cookies.section2Item2: Preference cookie: Your choice in the cookie notice (stored in localStorage) — so we don't ask again.
cookies.section2Item3: Analytics (optional): Only loaded if you accept analytics in the cookie banner. If Google Analytics is used, IP anonymization is recommended. Legal basis: explicit consent (GDPR Art. 6(1)(a)).
cookies.section3Text: If Google Analytics (Google LLC) is used for optional analytics, Google's privacy practices are subject to their own policies. Contact form submissions may be processed through a service like Web3Forms; this is server-side and independent of your analytics consent.
cookies.section4Item2: Analytics cookies: Subject to Google default settings
cookies.section5Text: You can block analytics cookies with the "Reject" button in our cookie notice. You can delete or block all cookies from your browser settings.
cookies.bannerText: We use cookies to improve your experience and measure site usage. Required cookies are necessary for the site. Analytics cookies are only loaded with your consent. For details, see
